title: Project Management - Dependencies Challenges
excerpt: I’m having issues with the Simple Project - Main Table that’s affecting my Gantt Chart. I’ve created a project plan for a construction project and the timeline (Selected FIXED) and when I put an update, it should automat…

posts.author: ProcessMinded (John F)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having issues with the Simple Project - Main Table that’s affecting my Gantt Chart. I’ve created a project plan for a construction project and the timeline (Selected FIXED) and when I put an update, it should automatically update the dates. Its not doing that…HELP! Any Monday.com user with GURU status that can help? I was trying to get away from Microsoft Project (its too cumbersome) and I’m a little frustrated!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ProcessMinded!

Sorry to hear this - I can understand the frustration

So that we can get a better understanding of the issue here, can you send over a short screen-recording by any chance? From what I can gather, dates are not changing in dependent items when you make a change in main item? A visual would be greatly appreciated just to ensure we are across the issue and can engage in some testing
